name: Shun Li
metaDescription: Personal academic homepage of Shun Li, Ph.D. in Financial Management. Research interests include financial economics, behavioural finance, asset pricing, investor sentiment, geopolitical risk, and volatility forecasting.
mapQuery: Dankook University, Yongin, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea
about: My research focuses on financial economics, behavioural finance, asset pricing, and volatility forecasting.
I am particularly interested in how geopolitical risk, policy uncertainty, investor sentiment, ESG-related uncertainty, and macro-financial conditions shape long-term volatility in financial markets.
researchInterests: Geopolitical risk, policy uncertainty, and macro-financial interactions
ESG uncertainty, green innovation, and corporate value

education.institution: School of Business Administration, Dankook University, Yongin, Republic of Korea
Financial economics, volatility modelling, macro-finance, and empirical asset pricing
